info.name: API Qris & VA V3
info.description: To use the API must have access to our panel like [https://panel.automatic.vip/[group]](https://panel.automatic.vip/%5Bgroup%5D) then login to the panel like below 1. Go to Menu "Toko". 2. Click button Bell in the right. 3. You will get "merchant UID" in number one in picture above. 4. Set url Callback notification in field number two in picture above.

request.description:
This API is used for auto rolling qris. Before hit Generate QRIS API, if you want your qris to be automatic roll to another QRIS when current QRIS has reached its limit, please hit this API first.

Request :

- client: you can get your client name from panel.otomatis.vip/\[client\]
- label: when you activate autorolling at our panel, you will input label, and pick some QRIS for 1 label. This is the label you should fill to the label key.
    

Please note, if you are running out of QRIS, this API will return uuid of empty string like example below

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": {
        "client": "clientname",
        "label": "yourlabel",
        "uuid": "youruuid"
    }
}

 ```

This API is used to create a qris with request data json:

**username** : this is key for username player in website or identifier you will get in notification callback

**amount** : this is integer you want pay minimum Rp 10.000,- and max Rp 10.000,000

**uuid** : this is "merchant UID" from above.

expire: this is optional. By default its value is 1200 seconds (20 minutes)

custom_ref: this is optional. For your custom needs. (max 36 length aplhanumeric)

And you will get response JSON :

**status** : you will get two value "true" and "false". if you get value true QRIS success generated

**data**: value of QRIS you must manualy create QRIS Image with this value

**trx_id:** this is unique ID from us for you keep, if you want statuc check for this trasaction you need use this ID

Qris expired in 24 hours

This APi for check status VERSION 2 to make sure if payment already paid, do not use this API more than 24 hours

Using method POST with BODY and replace \[trx_id\] in URL with trx_id you get from generate API response.

you will get response json :

**status:** you will receive 2 value success / pending

if status false you will get message in key **error** otherwise you will get key same as like webhook request body data

Note: success trasaction only with status : "success"

This is the API for inquiry transfer fund. You can only use this API when we provide you a "client key"

Explanation Request :

- client: fill this with your panel name (eg: panel.otomatis.vip/asdasd, the value is "asdasd")
    
- client_key: fill this with client key we give you
    
- uuid: fill this with qris uuid (you can see this at "Toko Menu" in panel.otomatis.vip/asdasd
    
- amount: amount to transfer
    
- bank_code: your bank destination (we will give you the list of banks)
    
- account_number: your account destination
    
- type: default 1 for BI FAST, 2 for RTOL (RTOL still in sandbox environment)
    
- note: this is optional. For your transaction note (max 64 length aplhanumeric)
    
- client_ref_id: this is optional. For your custom needs. (max 64 length aplhanumeric)
    

**Note: This API only checks if a transfer** _**can**_ **be processed — it does not send funds yet.**

**You must call the Transfer Fund API to perform the actual disbursement**

response.name: Inquiry Transfer Fund Success
response.body:
{
    "status": true,
    "data": {

        "inquiry_id": 2949850
    }
}

request.description:
This API is used to execute the actual fund disbursement (money transfer) after a successful Inquiry request.  
  
You can only use this API if we have provided you with a valid client key.  
You must also include the inquiry_id obtained from the Inquiry API response.

Explanation Request :

- client: fill this with your panel name (eg: panel.otomatis.vip/asdasd, the value is "asdasd")
    
- client_key: fill this with client key we give you
    
- uuid: fill this with qris uuid (you can see this at "Toko Menu" in panel.otomatis.vip/asdasd
    
- amount: amount to transfer
    
- bank_code: your bank destination (we will give you the list of banks)
    
- account_number: your account destination
    
- type: default 1 for BI FAST, 2 for RTOL (Real Time Transfer Online)
    
- inquiry_id: id you get from inquiry response
    

For disbursement with ewallet destination you can use this  
account_number: account number of ewallet destination e.g: 08XXXXX  
bank_code: OVO, GOPAY, DANA, SHOPEEPAY for now we only support this e-wallet

This API checks the status of a fund transfer.

Use `POST` method and replace `{partner_ref_no}` in the URL with the reference number from the Inquiry API response.

If the transaction exists, you’ll receive transaction details with a `status` of `"success"` or `"failed"`.

If the transaction cannot be found, you’ll receive a response with `"status": false` and an `error` message.

NOTE:

1. This API should only be called after the Transfer Fund API. Calling this API right after the Inquiry API will return **“Transaksi tidak ditemukan”** because no disbursement has been made yet.
    
2. If you receive the message **"Transaction data not found"**, it means the transaction record was not confirmed by the vendor. Please provide the transaction details and contact our Customer Support team for further verification before taking any action.

This is webhook notification when you set URL above in "Toko" you will recieve this notification when Qris already payed.

explanation request:

**amount**: Amount user paid in QRIS

**terminal_id**: this value is username from request "genertate" using key "username"

**trx_id:** this value same as key trx_id from response generate QRIS

**rrn**: unique ID bank payment

custom_ref: if you send custom_ref when generate QRIS, it will be added in this key

**vendor**: Name of vendor

**status**: this value always "success"

**create_at**: Time generate QRIS

**finish_at**: TIme QRIS already paid

This webhook notification will be sent to the callback URL that you configure in **“Toko”**. You will receive this notification **after the fund transfer has been processed**, either successfully or unsuccessfully. --- ## When will you receive this callback? The callback is triggered **once the transfer process is completed** with one of the following results: - **success** → the fund transfer was completed successfully - **failed** → the fund transfer failed ## Callback Request Parameters | Field | Description | | --- | --- | | **amount** | The amount of funds transferred. | | **partner_ref_no** | Transaction reference number. This value is the **same** `partner_ref_no` **returned in the inquiry transfer response** and should be used to identify the transaction. | | **status** | Transaction status:
• `success` – transfer completed successfully
• `failed` – transfer failed | | **transaction_date** | The date and time when the fund transfer was processed. |

This API is used to get balance :

- in the url parameter use uuid merchant
- in the body section, client name (eg: panel.otomatis.vip/abcd), then its value is abcd
